# Hadi Abou Daya - Full Profile

> AI/ML Consultant, Cloud Architect, Web3 Builder, and Software Engineer based in Paris, France. Building intelligent systems from edge to cloud.

## Professional Summary

Hadi Abou Daya is an AI/ML Consultant and Software Engineer with experience spanning LLM agent architectures, multi-agent systems, RAG pipelines, computer vision, cloud-native AI, and blockchain/Web3. He holds degrees from emlyon business school (MSc Data Science & AI Strategy) and McGill University, along with AWS and PMP certifications. Based in Paris, he works with clients globally to build AI-powered products.

## Experience

### AI Consultant at Supportful (Jan 2026 - Present)
- Building AI-powered products as a freelance consultant
- Architected a multi-agent sales copilot using LangGraph for B2B sales intelligence
- Delivered a LangGraph + Gemini platform for natural language court booking and BI analytics
- Technologies: LangGraph, Gemini, AWS, Salesforce, React, PostgreSQL

### Data Scientist Intern at Savencia (Jul 2025 - Dec 2025)
- Led causal inference research to optimize lactoferrin production in dairy manufacturing
- Built end-to-end Databricks data pipelines for experiment tracking and causal analysis
- Technologies: DoWhy, EconML, CausalNex, Databricks, Python

### AI Software Engineer at MOPO (Aug 2023 - Jul 2025)
- Architected multi-LLM agent system with lead agent orchestrating specialized tool agents
- Implemented RAG pipelines with vector embeddings, knowledge graphs, and semantic routers
- Led scalable deployment on AWS ECS
- Technologies: LangChain, LLMs, RAG, AWS ECS, Docker, PostgreSQL

### Freelance AI Consultant (Aug 2023 - Dec 2024)
- TowardsChange: LLM chatbot and RAG agent on Azure AI Search
- ShebangNow: CV ranking system and RAG chatbot for recruitment
- AI.skilled: GenAI architecture design, managed team of 3 engineers
- Traveln.ai: RAG system and voice-to-JSON agent for travel booking
- Technologies: LLMs, Azure AI, RAG, Vector Search

### ML Specialist at Mobile Arts (Jun 2022 - Aug 2023)
- Built AWS content moderation service
- Developed AI anomaly detection on AWS Lambda
- Created predictive engine on SageMaker for ad traffic optimization
- Trained and deployed YOLOv8 logo detection model
- Technologies: AWS (Lambda, SageMaker, EC2, DynamoDB), Angular, .NET Core, YOLOv8

### CV Developer at Decentra Tech (May 2021 - May 2022)
- Trained and deployed computer vision models for automotive safety on edge devices
- Built inference pipelines on NVIDIA Jetson Nano and Jetson Orin
- Technologies: NVIDIA TAO, DeepStream SDK, TensorRT, Jetson

## Education

- **MSc Data Science & AI Strategy** - emlyon business school, Paris (2024-2026)
- **Exchange Semester** - McGill University, Montreal (2025)
- **BE Computer & Communications Engineering** - Saint Joseph University of Beirut (2018-2023)

- **AI/ML:** LLM Agents, Multi-Agent Systems, RAG, Computer Vision, NLP, Causal Inference, Deep Learning
- **Cloud:** AWS (SageMaker, ECS, Lambda, EC2), Azure AI, Databricks, Docker, Kubernetes
- **Languages:** Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, C#, SQL
- **Frameworks:** LangChain, LangGraph, React, Next.js, Node.js
- **Edge AI:** NVIDIA Jetson, TensorRT, DeepStream, TAO Toolkit
- **Web3:** Blockchain, Smart Contracts, Decentralized Applications
